name: Chocolate Covered Cherries 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the cherries well.
2. Mix together the peanut butter, butter, confectioner's sugar, and chopped pecans.
3. Take about 1 tbsp of the peanut butter mixture and shape it around each cherry.
4. Place the coated cherries on wax paper and chill until firm.
5. Melt the chocolate and paraffin wax over low heat.
6. Dip the cherries by their stems into the melted chocolate, coating them completely.
7. Chill until the chocolate has set, then store in the refrigerator or freezer.
